common.offline_detected: Offline detected. Read-only operations are queued and will retry when online.
common.network_mismatch_warning: Deposits and withdrawals are disabled. Switch to {expectedNetwork} in Freighter: Settings → Network → {expectedNetwork}.
common.deposit_desc: Add funds to your Stellar account
common.portfolio_desc: View your asset balance and value

chat.placeholder: Ask about XLM rates, deposit, or anything Stellar...
chat.error_message: Message failed to send. Please check your connection.

errors.101: The contract has not been initialized.
errors.102: The contract has already been initialized.
errors.201: The caller is not authorized to perform this action.
errors.202: The action is disallowed (e.g. not on allowlist).
errors.203: There is no pending admin to accept.
errors.204: The recipient address is invalid for this operation.
errors.205: The caller is not registered as an operator.
errors.301: The provided amount must be greater than zero.
errors.302: The amount exceeds the configured token limit.
errors.303: The user's per-token daily deposit accumulator has exceeded the configured limit.
errors.304: The user's daily fiat-equivalent volume limit has been exceeded.
errors.305: The deposit reference string exceeds the maximum length.
errors.306: A security cooldown is currently active for this user.
errors.308: The specified token is not supported by the bridge.
errors.309: The address is on the denylist and cannot perform this action.
errors.310: Rescue of this token is forbidden (protocol or whitelisted token).
errors.401: The contract or user has insufficient balance.
errors.402: There are no accrued fees available to withdraw.
errors.501: The specified withdrawal request ID does not exist.
errors.502: The withdrawal request is still within its lock period.
errors.601: The specified admin action ID does not exist.
errors.602: The admin action is still within its timelock period, or queue_admin_action was called with delay < MIN_TIMELOCK_DELAY (34,560 ledgers ≈ 48 h).
errors.603: The inactivity period required for emergency recovery has not passed.
errors.604: No emergency recovery address has been configured.
errors.701: No price oracle has been configured.
errors.702: The oracle returned an invalid or zero price.
errors.703: The price slippage exceeds the maximum allowed threshold.
errors.801: The user's daily withdrawal quota has been exceeded.
errors.802: The escrow migration has already been completed.
errors.803: One or more operations in the batch failed.
errors.901: The provided nonce is invalid (too high/future nonce).
errors.902: The provided nonce has already been used (replay attempt).
